featureName: BUG-007-003: keep_bridge.serialize_note silently swallows gkeepapi exceptions (code-review H-3)

completedPhaseClaims.evidence: RED captured (6 tests FAIL with 0 WARNINGs) via git stash of ml/app/keep_bridge.py; fix applied: 5 except-pass blocks replaced with except-as-exc + logger.warning, shared timestamps try-block split into two, hasattr(items) guard removed. GREEN: 30 passed in 11.30s (7 new + 23 existing).

Full ML suite via ./smackerel.sh test unit --python: 457 passed in 12.99s. Adversarial test_all_five_failures_emit_five_distinct_warnings asserts len(warnings)==5 with all 5 context tokens; demonstrated detection of absence (RED=0) and partial fixes (2, then 4).

executionHistory.evidence: Bug filed from code-review finding H-3. ml/app/keep_bridge.py::serialize_note has 5 distinct `try: except Exception: pass` blocks (lines ~78-120) swallowing gkeepapi attribute-access exceptions (labels.all, collaborators.all, items, timestamps.updated, timestamps.created). Silent data corruption with no log, metric, or alert. Fix is additive: keep `pass` for resilience, add `logger.warning(...)` per block.
8-artifact bug folder created: bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json, state.json. Root cause and fix approach documented in design.md.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand design phase because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.design dispatch during bugfix-fastlane convergence; root cause is mechanical and design.md authored by bubbles.bug is already correct.
executionHistory.evidence: Confirmed bubbles.bug initial design.md is correct; root cause is 5 silent except-pass blocks in serialize_note; fix is mechanical addition of logger.warning per block plus splitting shared timestamps try-block into two independent blocks for independent observability.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand plan phase because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.plan dispatch during bugfix-fastlane convergence.
executionHistory.evidence: Refined scopes.md to canonical scope status (Done), 6 Gherkin scenarios paired 1:1 with faithful DoD items (G068), added scenario-specific regression DoD item, added broader regression DoD item, added Consumer Impact Sweep DoD item, populated all DoD items inline with raw evidence.

Fix landed in ml/app/keep_bridge.py: 5 except-pass blocks replaced with except-as-exc + logger.warning naming the context and exception type; shared timestamps try-block split into two independent blocks; hasattr(items) guard removed so iteration failure surfaces. Fallback values preserved. Regression suite ml/tests/test_keep_bridge_warnings.py covers SCN-GK-BUG-003-A..F.
